My makeup is dramatic with heavy contouring and perhaps a skeletal motif nodding to the video. The lighting is high-contrast and theatrical, casting long, sharp shadows. The vibe is empowering, monstrous, and unapologetically proud.

Transform the uploaded image into a highly detailed retro-futuristic illustrated portrait while preserving the subject's exact facial features, identity, expression, pose, skin tone, proportions, and overall likeness. Dress the subject in a deep teal-blue aviator hood and matching fitted leather gloves. Add oversized vintage brass flight goggles with weathered metallic details resting on top of the head. Include large round dark-blue eyeglasses with subtle reflections. The subject should have striking golden-amber eyes with intricate highlights.

10/11 While we don't yet have telescopes powerful enough to directly observe a blanet, the math points to a universe teeming with them.

It forces a radical reimagining of cosmology. Our search for new worlds has been entirely too narrow, focused solely on starlight.

9/11 The environment on a blanet would be profoundly alien.

+ Then, on the Monday of your choice (or the Sunday of your choice), before 13:00 (UTC), Please reply to this post: your reply should contain the name of the city you chose.

+ after that The RandomBot chose a city.

record.bridgyOriginalText:
We just went through open enrollment at work for health, dental and vision insurance.
New cards for dental and vision (both provided by Anthem Blue Cross) just arrived in the mail.
They erroneously sent a card for my daughter, who is not eligible to be on the plan since she's too old, and didn't send a card for my wife as they should've.
The error with the cards probably reflects an error in our coverage.
Who screwed up, my employer, Rippling (our HR app), or Anthem?
Stay tuned for updates.

external.title: Original post on federate.social

A photorealistic celestial traveler angel sits upon a carved marble ledge within a sunlit temple of pale stone columns and glowing architecture. Warm golden light pours through the scene, illuminating her large white feathered wings, whose subtle variations and gently weathered edges hint at countless journeys rather than conflict. Around her head and shoulders, delicate arcs of starlight, faint constellations, and tiny luminous particles drift in slow orbit, forming an intimate celestial halo.

She wears a cropped white top, denim shorts, and intricate leather travel harnesses and bracers that suggest both practicality and adventure. Her blonde hair falls in soft windswept waves with a few braided strands woven naturally through it. Her expression is calm, thoughtful, and approachable, carrying the quiet confidence of someone who has traveled far and witnessed much.

The marble surroundings, radiant sky, and softly glowing celestial effects create an atmosphere of serenity and wonder. The image balances earthly realism with divine presence, presenting a wanderer between worlds—majestic yet human, experienced yet gentle, resting briefly beneath the stars she seems to carry with her.

images.alt: {a golden-hour|an overcast|a misty summer dawn} scene of an ancient {half-timbered|weathered stone-and-wood} Alsatian watermill, its {moss-covered|ivy-clad} walls leaning slightly with age, perched beside a {rushing|gently burbling} stream where the {iron-bound oak|crumbling slate} (undershot waterwheel turns with a rhythmic groan to froth the water from the supply water channel, splashing water). The mill’s {sagging|steeply pitched} roof sports {missing tiles|lichen-furrowed shingles}, and {rustic wooden shutters|carved window boxes overflowing with geraniums} frame its {leaded glass|cracked panes}. Behind it, a dense {mixed forest of beech and oak|pine and birch} looms, shadows pooling beneath the trees where a {grizzled|lean and watchful} hunter in {a worn green loden coat|a patched leather jerkin} stands poised, his {grizzled wirehaired hound|keen-eyed pointer} alert at his side, both silhouetted against the {dappled sunlight|shifting cloudlight} filtering through the canopy. The sky above is a {dramatic swirl of cumulus|soft watercolor wash} in {pearl-gray|gold-tinged} tones, and the air hums with {the scent of damp earth and wild mint|the distant cry of a buzzard}. {A wooden footbridge|a cluster of foxgloves} adds a {charming|foreboding} accent to the foreground, while the mill’s {rickety sluice gate|abandoned grinding stones} hints at {centuries of labor|whispers of abandonment}. The composition balances {idyllic nostalgia|quiet tension}, as if the scene could pivot toward {a fairy-tale vignette|a Grimm brothers’ fable} with the slightest shift of light.
